name: Strawberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. For the crust: Stir together Graham cracker crumbs and sugar. Mix in butter thoroughly and press into a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Cool.
4. Reduce oven temperature to 300°F.
5. For the filling: Beat cream cheese in a large mixing bowl. Gradually add sugar, beating until fluffy. Add lemon peel and vanilla. Beat in eggs one at a time. Pour into shell. Bake for 1 hour or until center is firm. Cool to room temperature and then spread with the strawberry glaze. Chill for 3 hours.
6. For the glaze: Blend sugar and cornstarch together in a small saucepan. Stir in water and strawberries. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils. Boil and stir for 1 minute. Cool thoroughly before spreading over cheesecake.
